title: Button UI Component in Design Systems
content: Button is a reusable, interactive UI element that triggers a specific action when clicked. As a fundamental element of user interaction, it serves as an imperative tool for navigation, form submission, and functionality initiation. Consistent design and implementation of buttons ensure intuitive user experience, reducing cognitive load. Teams employ them in different states and styles to denote importance and purpose. These pre-defined styles are applied across different parts of a software application or website, ensuring efficient, harmonious design throughout. in Design Systems Adobe Spectrum Alaska Airlines Auro Amazon Cloudscape Apple HIG Atlassian Design System Audi Basis Biings Brainly Pencil Carrefour Marcel CBRE Build Blocks Datadog Druids Dell Docplanner Watson eBay Evo Elastic Esri Calcite General Electric Edison Github Primer GitLab Pajamas Google Material Design GOV.UK Gusto Workbench Helly Hansen IBM Carbon Ideagen Helix INPS Sirio Kajabi Sage Kiwicom Orbit Lemon Squeezy Wedges Line LocalTapiola Duet Michelin Motion Microsoft Fluent 2 Monday.com Vibe MongoDB LeafyGreen Motorway Highway Code Mozilla Protocol Nordhealth Ontario Orange Palantir Blueprint Pinterest Gestalt Pluralsight Porsche Razorpay Blade Red Hat PatternFly Rei Cedar Salesforce Lightning Samsung One UI Seek Braid Segment Evergreen ServiceNow Horizon Shopify Polaris Skoda Flow Sprout Social Seeds SumUp Circuit Sunrise Solar Teamleader Ahoy Thumbtack Thumbprint Twilio Paste U.S. Web UAE Uber Base Vercel Geist Visa Washington Post Wikimedia Codex Wise Wonderflow Wanda Workday Canvas Zendesk Garden
